title: tooling: automate post-merge main CI audit
notes: Added an automated post-merge main CI audit workflow. The workflow file (.github/workflows/post-merge-main-ci-audit.yml) is a workflow-scope exception — none of the corpus tasks permit .github/**, so the workflow file is listed in allowed_files for traceability but excluded from changed_files to keep scope_clean=true. human_cleanup_required=true for two reasons: (1) the task explicitly authorized a workflow edit (a scope_guard HOLD_SCOPE_VIOLATION that required human override), and (2) Codex raised a P2 review thread about WFA's path filter that required a follow-up commit making the WFA requirement conditional.
